questions: How does tarot card reading work?
How many cards in a tarot deck?
tarot card reading ki shotti kore?
answers: Tarot is a deck of 78 cards used for divination and self-reflection. It includes 22 Major Arcana cards representing life themes and 56 Minor Arcana cards for daily situations.
Tarot card reading involves drawing cards from a shuffled deck and interpreting their symbols and positions. It's used as a tool for introspection and guidance rather than literal fortune-telling.
Tarot holo 78 ta card er ekta deck je divination ar self-reflection er jonno use hoy. Major Arcana ar Minor Arcana ei dui bhage divided. Cards er symbolism interpret kore guidance pawa jay.

A tarot deck has 78 cards split into Major and Minor Arcana. During a reading, cards are drawn and interpreted based on their imagery, position, and relationship to each other. Many find it helpful for gaining new perspectives on life situations.
